title: Asafusa's Tree Vein
description: Break one part of the tree(log) and it will break the entire tree.
body:
break just one log, and the entire tree will break! Logs will drop. gathering super fast and satisfying. ✨

Features:
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eae9d5a17e3109642e3a596f75df818ce1d334a2.png)
🌳 Full Tree Breaking: Break a single log, and the whole tree goes down!

🎮 Vanilla-Friendly: Works in vanilla Minecraft—no mods needed.

🌲 All Trees Supported.

How It Works:

1. You break a log.
2. The datapack finds all connected logs above and around it.
3. All logs break at once, dropping items naturally.

Why You’ll Love It:
1. Faster wood farming = more time for building! 🏰
2. Great for survival players who hate chopping forever.
3. Makes clearing forests fun and easy. 🌳💨

How to Install:

1. Download the datapack.
2. Drop it in your world’s datapacks folder.
3. Type /reload in-game.
4. Chop one log and watch the magic happen! ✨
